meaning: v.重新估计n.重新估计,再估值
examples: In particular, the team can estimate the three values — lowest, nominal, and highest estimations — assuming that the risk was removed, and then apply these values to reestimate the project variance.
The budget estimators pretend the loans cost taxpayers little or nothing as the money goes out the door, then make an "upward reestimate" to reflect the true cost.
